hooks.command: [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks gemini stop || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks gemini prompt-submit || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks feed --source gemini --event PreToolUse || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks gemini session-end || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_GEMINI_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks gemini session-start || echo '{}'
